Narmada 19ssammfi1fifin§vfrafitwwmfi memm 666(31)’111fi'§10‘fi§l,2003 mfifiafififimwafitmmfififimfifimm ammmmmmemammm W— 11111 111 Marga-'11 mm 905(31),ar1°r§1 5 3111111 2003 1=111.a~11.889(a-1) m 5 3111111, 2004, $1.311. 166(31),111m§4151afi, 2005 301mm 1093(31), 1110a4m,2005$1311.133(31)111€1§3Wf1,2006, 1111.311. 1218(31), 11181: 28 W, 2006, 151.311. 104(31), 1111113211130, 2007 3111311311. 11129031106613“. 20072101131305 MINISTRY or WATER RESOURCES narmcmm New Delhi, the 30th January, 2008 8.0. 212(E).—-Whereas the Government of India in the Ministry of Water Resources vide its notification number 8.0. 169(E), dated the 2nd April, 1986 constituted the Ravi and Beas Waters Tribunal for verification and adjudication of certain matters referred therein, and the . REGD. N0. D. L—33004/99 V“ 1 -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIAzEXTRAORDINARY said Tribunal forwarded its report to the Central Government on 30th January, 1987; And whereas, further references have been made by the Central Government to the said Tribunal on 19th August, 1987 requiring explanation and guidance on the report aforesaid; And whereas, considering the enormous exercise undertaken by the said Tribunal in completing its further report, the Central Goverru'nent extended the period of making the said report, from time to time, till the 5th February. 2008; And whereas, the Central Government, keeping in View the exigencies of the work involved, as pointed out by the said Tribunal, considers it necessary to extend the said period for another six months afier the 5th February, 2008; ' Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by the proviso to subsection (3) of Section 5 ofthe Inter— State River Water Disputes Act. 1956 (33 of 1956), the Cenn'al Government hereby further extends the period, within which the Tribunal may forward its report on the references so made, to the Central Government till the 5th day of August, 2008, and for that purpose makes the [Pm II—SEC. 301)] following further amendment in the notification of the Government of india in the Ministry of Water Resources number 8.0. 905(E), dated the 5th August, 2003,namely.— 1n the said notification, in the last paragraph, for the words, figures and letters "till the 5th day of February, 2008", the Words, figures and letters “till the 5th day of August, 2008" shall be substituted. [F.No.15/3/85-IT] GAURI CHATTERJI, Secy. Note :—-The principal notification constituting the Ravi and Beas Water Tribunal was published in the Gazette of India vide number 3,0. 169(E), dated the 2nd April, l986 and subsequently amended Vida number 8.0. 666(E), dated the 10th June, 2003; and the period within which the Tribunal was required to forward its further report to the Central Government was extended from time to time vide number 5.0. 905(E), dated the 5th August, 2003, 5.0. 889(E), dated the 5th August, 2004; 8.0. 166(E), dated the 4th Febniary, 2005 ; S.Oi 1093(E), dated the 4th August, 2005; SO. 133(E), dated the 3rd February, 2006; 5.0. 1218(E), dated the 28th July, 2006; 5.0. [04(E), dated the 2nd February, 2007 and 8.0. l 1 i 2(E), dated the 6th July, 2007.
